name: obsidian-math-booster
description: An Obsidian.md plugin that provides a powerful indexing & referencing system for theorems & equations in your vault. Bring LaTeX-like workflow into Obsidian with theorem environments, automatic equation numbering, and more.

scripts.build: npm run build:compile && npm run build:bundle && npm run build:styles
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.test: npm run lint:check && npm run format:check && npm run spellcheck && npm run build:compile
scripts.ci: npm run test && npm run build

author: Ryota Ushio
